KeyFeatureCase1.sectionTitle: Why GPT Image 2 Is Different From Every AI Image Tool You've Tried
KeyFeatureCase1.subtitle: Whether you are a designer, marketer, or solo creator, GPT Image 2 delivers a practical feature set that is powerful and easy to use.

items.title: Perfect Text Inside Images
items.text: Every other AI image model treats text as an afterthought. Signs come out garbled. Posters look like ransom notes. GPT Image 2 was rebuilt from scratch to render readable, properly placed text on the first try - headlines, buttons, labels, and even mixed-language layouts.
items.bestFor: Best for: Event posters, product banners, social graphics, UI wireframes, promotional materials.

items.title: Reasoning Before Generating
items.text: GPT Image 2 does not just match your words to pixels. It reasons through your request: understanding spatial relationships, planning the composition, and verifying accuracy before the first pixel renders. Ask it to generate a poster for a current event and it will look up the details in real time.
items.bestFor: Best for: Storytelling, product visualization, scene construction, character design.

items.title: Multilingual Visual Content
items.text: Working across global markets? GPT Image 2 natively supports Japanese, Korean, Chinese, Hindi, Bengali, and all Latin-script languages - rendered correctly inside images, not translated after the fact. Build one visual campaign that works everywhere.
items.bestFor: Best for: Graphic novel artists, UX storyboarders, brand campaign creators.

items.title: Production-Ready Resolution
items.text: Generate high-resolution visuals for posters, thumbnails, UI mockups, and product concepts. Paid plans may include higher-resolution export or upscaling options depending on availability. No watermarks. Outputs are royalty-free and cleared for commercial use under OpenAI's content policy.
items.bestFor: Best for: Teams testing multiple creative directions quickly.

items.title: Image-to-Image Editing
items.text: Upload any reference photo and describe what you want to change. GPT Image 2 edits with surgical precision - swap backgrounds, change colors, localize designs, or remove objects while preserving everything else exactly as-is.
items.bestFor: Best for: Concept prototyping, fast ideation, and creative exploration loops.

HowToStepsCase1.sectionTitle: How to Use GPT Image 2 - 3 Simple Steps
HowToStepsCase1.subtitle: Using GPT Image 2 on gptimage.tools requires no technical background, no model downloads, and no complex setup.

steps.name: Step 1: Describe Your Vision
steps.text: Type your prompt in plain English. Include subject, style, and any exact text you want in the image.

steps.name: Step 2: Choose Your Settings
steps.text: Choose aspect ratio and quality based on your output target: social, banner, UI mockup, or print draft.

steps.name: Step 3: Generate and Download
steps.text: Generate, refine in natural language, and download your final watermark-free image in seconds.

TestimonialGridCase3.sectionTitle: What Users Say About Seedream 5.0 AI Image Generator
TestimonialGridCase3.subtitle: Hear from creators who have transformed their workflow with Seedream 5.0

testimonials.name: Sarah Chen
testimonials.content: Seedream 5.0 has revolutionized our content creation process. We now generate stunning marketing visuals in minutes that used to take our design team hours to create. The quality is exceptional, and our social media engagement has increased by 40%.

testimonials.name: Michael Torres
testimonials.content: As a creative director, I'm always looking for tools that can help my team work faster without sacrificing quality. Seedream 5.0 delivers on both fronts. The AI's understanding of context and ability to generate on-brand visuals is impressive.

testimonials.name: Emily Watson
testimonials.content: Seedream 5.0 has been a game-changer for my online store. I can now create professional product images without expensive photoshoots. The consistency across all my product listings has improved my brand perception and increased sales.

testimonials.name: James Wilson
testimonials.content: As a content creator, visuals are everything. Seedream 5.0 helps me create thumbnails and Image graphics that stand out. The real-time web search feature ensures my visuals are always current and relevant to my content.

testimonials.name: Lisa Zhang
testimonials.content: I use Seedream 5.0 as a tool to generate ideas and speed up my workflow. It's not a replacement for my skills, but it's an invaluable assistant that helps me explore more creative directions and deliver projects faster to my clients.
